title: cyperus niger var. capitatus
intro: Cyperus niger var. capitatus, also known as black sedge or black umbrella sedge, is a plant species that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps, due to its analgesic and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Cyperus niger var. capitatus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically in the form of creams or ointments to utilize its medicinal properties.
